questions.question: Explain the difference between $@ and $* in shell scripting
expectedPoints: $@ expands to separate words for each positional parameter
$* expands to a single word with all parameters
Difference in behavior when used with quotes

questions.question: Describe how you would create a robust shell script with error handling and signal trapping
expectedPoints: Using set -e for immediate exit on error
Implementing proper error checking for commands
Using trap for signal handling (SIGINT, SIGTERM)
